rule: Property must be multifamily (multiple dwelling units).
Projects must be installed at sites served by participating electric utilities (PG&E, SCE, SDG&E, SMUD region-specific notes may apply).
Contractor must be enrolled with TECH Clean California; incentives are paid to enrolled contractors.
Equipment must meet program specification (JA13/ENERGY STAR/EcoPort or ENERGY STAR v2.0 for commercial equipment where applicable).
Projects may require demand response enrollment and/or TOU configuration depending on pathway (in‑unit vs. central).
Thermostatic mixing valve required for domestic water heating projects (integrated or added).
